environmentvariabledefinition.description: FALLBACK ONLY. Each subsidiary's president is stored on the va_CompanyEntity record (va_presidentUserId). This variable is used when no company-specific president is found — e.g. for shared-services applications or misconfigured company codes.
environmentvariabledefinition.hint: Populate va_CompanyEntity.va_presidentUserId for each of the 8 subsidiaries first. Only set this as a catch-all fallback.
